title: ARCHETYPE_EXHAUSTION_2026-05-11 - All BTCUSDT archetypes exhausted or NO_EDGE confirmed
content: Updated exhaustion after session 9 (2026-05-10/11). All available spec-driven archetypes on BTCUSDT have been null-screened or fully swept. Results: (1) DCB 4h: NOT_ROBUST walk-forward (regime collapse 2025-2026). (2) DCB 1h: NO_EDGE null-screen. (3) DCB 15m: NO_EDGE null-screen. (4) MRO 1h/4h/15m: NO_EDGE null-screens. (5) MMR 1h: NO_EDGE null-screen. (6) MMR 4h: NO_EDGE null-screen (all 8 draws PF<0.72). (7) TPB 1h: Frequency-starved (n=2-32). (8) TPB 4h: Frequency-starved (n=0-3 native, worst case). (9) TPR: Frequency-starved all intervals. (10) FCARRY: Blocked by Java param bug. DCB 5m remains untested (currently running null-screen). Remaining credible options require operator action: ETH backfill, FCARRY fix, or a new spec archetype.

data_wishlist.effort: 1-line Java fix: replace strategyParamService.getActiveOverrides() with BacktestParamOverrideContext approach
data_wishlist.impact: Enables FCARRY sweep with varying entryZ, positionSizePct, fundingThreshBps. Funding-rate carry is fundamentally regime-neutral (positive when funding is positive, regardless of BTC price direction).

data_wishlist.action: Backfill ETHUSDT feature_store for all 4 intervals
data_wishlist.impact: Opens ETH for DCB/MRO/MMR. ETH had different regime dynamics in 2025-2026. DCB 4h ETH may not have the 2024 bias issue.
data_wishlist.unlocks: DCB ETHUSDT 4h, MRO ETHUSDT 4h, MMR ETHUSDT 4h

data_wishlist.action: Design and deploy a new spec archetype targeting the 2025-2026 range-bound regime
data_wishlist.effort: New engine class + YAML spec + operator deploy
data_wishlist.impact: All existing archetypes (DCB=breakout, MRO/MMR=mean-reversion) are tuned for specific regimes. A dual-mode strategy that adapts between trending and range-bound regimes may find the missing edge.
data_wishlist.unlocks: New archetype tailored to 2025-2026 choppy BTC

structured_data.key_finding: All tested strategies show regime-dependent performance. DCB works in 2024 trending BTC but fails in 2025-2026 choppy market. Mean-reversion strategies (MRO, MMR) show no edge at any interval on BTCUSDT. The 4th strategy requires either (a) a regime-neutral mechanism (FCARRY), (b) a different symbol (ETH), or (c) a new archetype design.
